left.label: L4 (Transport Layer)
left.description: Routes purely on IP address and port — never looks inside the packet. Extremely fast, used by ChatGPT, Google, and other high-volume systems.
traits: Can't do A/B testing or routing by URL

right.label: L7 (Application Layer)
right.description: Inspects the actual HTTP content — URLs, headers, cookies — before deciding where to route. Slower, but enables smart routing.
